name: PT Wijaya Karya Beton Tbk
summary: PT Wijaya Karya Beton Tbk manufactures and sells pre-stressed concrete (PC) products in Indonesia. The company offers concrete poles; piles, rounded hollow poles, poles hollow boxes, and cylinder piles; concrete pipe products; PC piles, such as spun, triangle, square hollow, and solid square piles; and railway concrete products, such as railway sleepers, poles, and bridges. It also provides bridge concrete products comprising girder, voided slab, double tee, full depth slab, and half slab concrete products; retaining wall concrete products, such as corrugated, flat prestressed, and flat reinforced concrete sheet piles; maritime concrete products including breakwater and dock components; hydro concrete products; building concrete products, which consists of precast walls, hollow core slabs, concrete slabs, columns, blocks, stairs, beams, and ladders; and ready-mix concrete. In addition, the company engages in the mining and production of split, screen material, etc.; engineering, production, and installation businesses; and provision of patent, inner bore system installation, gantry, and post tensioning services. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Wijaya Karya Beton Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk.
